controls.name: hns_enabled_detection
controls.description: Verify only required storage accounts have the hierarchical namespace (HNS) option enabled (e.g., by using a custom Azure Policy on {"isHnsEnabled": "true"} in Audit mode).

controls.name: shared_key_access_enabled
controls.description: Verify only storage accounts allowing SAS token authentication have it enabled (e.g., by using Azure built-in policy StorageAccountAllowSharedKeyAccess_Audit.json).

controls.name: private_endpoint_authorized
controls.description: Verify only authorized private endpoints are configured on storage accounts (e.g., by using the built-in Azure Policy "Storage accounts should use Private Link" in Audit mode).

controls.name: storage_firewall_restricted
controls.description: Verify only authorized IPs are permitted through each storage account firewall (e.g., by using built-in Azure Policy "Storage accounts should restrict network access" in Audit mode).

controls.name: authorized_region_detection
controls.description: Verify only the authorized storage account region is set for redundancy (e.g., by using a custom Azure Policy with {"location": ["eastus","westeurope"]} in Audit mode).

controls.name: shared_key_auth_detection
controls.description: Verify Shared Key authorization is disabled (and optionally that OAuth is the default) for authorized storage accounts that host authorized blobs, file shares, queues, tables, and DFS (e.g., by using a custom Azure Policy to require "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/allowSharedKeyAccess" = false and, optionally, "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/defaultToOAuthAuthentication" = true in Audit mode).

controls.name: cors_trusted_origins_detection
controls.description: Verify only authorized CORS trusted origins and corresponding settings are configured (e.g., by using a custom Azure Policy on {"Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/cors.allowedOrigins[*]": ["https://myapp.contoso.com"]} in Audit mode).

controls.name: file_share_smb21_required
controls.description: Verify only file shares that require NFS/SMB 2.1 have it enabled (e.g., by using a custom Azure Policy on {"Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/fileServices/protocolSettings.smb.protocolVersions[*]": ["SMB2.1"]} in Audit mode).

controls.name: storage_account_lock_required
controls.description: Verify required storage accounts have read-only and/or delete locks applied (e.g., by using built-in Azure Policy "Resource locks should be applied" in Audit mode).

controls.name: file_share_security_protocol_required
controls.description: Verify required file shares' security protocol settings are configured (e.g., by using a custom Azure Policy on {"Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/fileServices/protocolSettings.smb": {"kerberosTicketEncryption":"AES256","channelEncryption":"Required"}} in Audit mode).

controls.name: container_immutability_required
controls.description: Verify required storage container blobs have immutability policies enabled (e.g., by using the built-in Azure Policy "Immutable blob storage should be enabled" in Audit mode).

controls.name: datalake_acl_security
controls.description: Verify Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 functionality is enabled only where Access Control Lists (ACLs) on containers are authorized (e.g., by using a custom Azure Policy to detect storage accounts where "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/isHnsEnabled" = true and "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/allowSharedKeyAccess" = false, in Audit mode).

controls.name: sftp_local_user_detection
controls.description: Verify local user functionality for SFTP is enabled only where local users, their permissions, and authentication methods are authorized (e.g., by using a custom Azure Policy to detect storage accounts where "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/localUsersEnabled" = true and "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/isSftpEnabled" = true, in Audit mode).
